name: Apple Cobbler (Using Biscuit Mix)
recipeInstructions:
4 servings of about 1/2 cup each
166 calories per serving
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix cornstarch, sugar, and cinnamon in a saucepan. Add 3/4 cup water and mix well.
3. Add apples. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until liquid thickens and apples just begin to soften—about 6 minutes.
4. Pour into a 1-quart casserole.
5. Stir biscuit mix and cheese together. Add 3 tablespoons water and mix well. Spread on top of apple mixture.
6. Bake until the top is lightly browned—about 30 minutes.
